questions: "At CyanGate, you led the development of the **Atlassian Jira Intelligence System**, which involved coordinating across multiple teams (engineering, product, and client stakeholders) to deliver a solution that impacted 100K+ tickets. **Tell me about a time during this project when there was a significant misalignment between what the client stakeholders expected and what your technical team could realistically deliver in the given timeline.**
What was the specific situation and the conflicting expectations?*
